---
name: Content correction
about: Report a scientific, mathematical, or factual error in an article or visualizer
title: "[Correction] "
labels: correction
---

**Where**
Page URL or file (e.g. `src/content/deep-dives/gas-laws.mdx`).

**What is wrong**
Describe the inaccuracy.

**What it should say**
The correct statement or value.

**Source**
A primary source supporting the correction (please include a link).
